programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Aaron and Laura rush to a young mother who is bleeding heavily from cervical cancer and a bizarre case for Lisa as she is called to a patient whose obsession with hot chillies has now left him in excruciating pain

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programme.title: Real Emergency: Episode
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: A hero bystander uses CPR to bring a woman back from the dead but intensive care paramedic Bill needs to get the grandmother to hospital before she goes back into a fatal cardiac arrest.

programme.title: Paramedics
